items.summary: Read bounded facts about the active After Effects project.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project state without modifying it.

examples.summary: Read a bounded summary when no project content exists.
Return a typed unavailable error before native dispatch.

items.summary: Read the open After Effects project's bit depth.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project bit depth without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: Read the project bits per channel.
Require an open project before reading bit depth.

items.summary: Set the open After Effects project's bit depth.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes project bit depth and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
targetDepth must differ from the current project bit depth.

examples.summary: Change the project from 8 to 16 bits per channel.
Reject a target that already matches the project bit depth.

items.summary: List a bounded page of items in the open After Effects project.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project items without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: List the first bounded page of an empty project.
Require an open project before listing items.

items.summary: List a bounded page of layers in one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads composition layers without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.items.list@1.

examples.summary: List the first bounded page of an empty composition.
Refresh a stale composition locator before listing layers.

items.summary: List a bounded page of selected layers in one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads selected composition layers without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.items.list@1.

examples.summary: List an empty selected-layer page for a composition.
Refresh a stale composition locator before listing selected layers.

items.summary: Read the current time of one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads composition time without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.items.list@1.

examples.summary: Read an exact rational current time from a composition.
Refresh a stale composition locator before reading current time.

items.summary: Set the current time of one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes composition current time and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.items.list@1.
targetTime must differ from the composition's current time.

examples.summary: Set and verify an exact rational composition time.
Refresh a stale composition locator before setting current time.

items.summary: Create one root composition in After Effects.
items.sideEffectSummary: Creates one root composition and one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: Create and verify one root composition with exact settings.
Inspect state when an idempotency key is already bound.

items.summary: Create one null or solid layer in an After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Creates one composition layer, may create one solid project item, and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.items.list@1.
kind must be null or solid and solid-only options require kind solid.

examples.summary: Create and verify one named null layer with Undo available.
Refresh a stale composition locator before creating a layer.

items.summary: Apply one installed After Effects effect to a layer by exact match name.
items.sideEffectSummary: Adds one installed effect to one layer and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
layerLocator must come from ae.composition.layers.list@1.
effectMatchName must exactly identify one installed effect.

examples.summary: Apply and verify one Slider Control effect with Undo available.
Reject a match name that does not identify an installed effect.

items.summary: List a bounded page of direct properties on an After Effects layer or property group.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads layer properties and safe primitive values without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
layerLocator must come from ae.composition.layers.list@1.
parentPropertyLocator must come from ae.layer.properties.list@1 for the same layer.

examples.summary: List the first bounded page of direct properties on a layer.
Refresh stale layer and property locators before listing properties.

items.summary: List a bounded page of exact keyframes on one After Effects layer property.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads native keyframe times, primitive values, and interpolation without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
propertyLocator must come from ae.layer.properties.list@1 in the current native session.
The property must be a keyframeable primitive scalar, vector, or color leaf stream.

examples.summary: Read an empty first keyframe page from a keyframeable property.
Reject a property whose native value cannot be represented safely.

items.summary: Set one non-keyframed primitive After Effects layer property value.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one primitive layer property and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
Both locators must come from ae.layer.properties.list@1 for the same layer.
The property must be a non-keyframed scalar, vector, or color leaf stream.
value must differ from the property's current sampled value.

examples.summary: Change one non-keyframed scalar property with Undo available.
Reject a keyframed stream without changing After Effects state.

items.summary: Read current After Effects project context and selected items.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project context without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Read metadata and bounded type facts for one After Effects project item.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads project item metadata without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
itemLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Read exact settings for one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads composition settings without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Set the exact work area of one After Effects composition.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one composition work area and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.
start plus duration must fit within the composition duration.
The requested work area must differ from the current work area.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Rename one After Effects project item.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one project item name and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
itemLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.
name must differ from the current project item name.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Set or clear one After Effects project item comment.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one project item comment and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
itemLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.
comment must differ from the current project item comment.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Set one numeric After Effects project item label slot.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one project item label and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
itemLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.
labelId must differ from the current project item label.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Duplicate one After Effects composition with an explicit new name.
items.sideEffectSummary: Adds one composition and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
compositionLocator must come from ae.project.context.read@1 or ae.project.items.list@1.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises the documented recovery path.

items.summary: Read one After Effects layer and its exact timeline state.
items.sideEffectSummary: Reads layer state without changing After Effects state.
preconditions: An After Effects project must be open.
layerLocator must come from a current native layer listing.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Rename one After Effects layer.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one layer name and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: layerLocator must be current.
name must differ from the current name.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Set one layer in point and duration using exact rational time.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one layer range and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: layerLocator must be current.
The range must fit the composition and differ from the current range.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Set one layer start time using exact rational time.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one layer start time and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: layerLocator must be current.
startTime must differ from the current start time.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Set one layer stretch as an exact signed ratio.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one layer stretch and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: layerLocator must be current.
stretch must be nonzero and differ from the current stretch.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Move one layer to an explicit composition stack index.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one layer stack position and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: layerLocator must be current.
targetStackIndex must exist and differ from the current stack index.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Set or clear one layer parent.
items.sideEffectSummary: Changes one layer parent and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: Both locators must be current and in the same composition.
A layer cannot parent itself and the requested parent must differ from the current parent.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.

items.summary: Duplicate one layer with an explicit new name.
items.sideEffectSummary: Adds one layer and creates one After Effects Undo step.
preconditions: layerLocator must be current.

examples.summary: Synthetic success demonstrates the typed result contract.
Synthetic failure exercises stale-locator recovery.
